prompt: Generate a homepage for a modern furniture e-commerce website. Use the hero layout from the first image and the navigation bar from the second.
prompt_refined:
Generate a homepage for a modern furniture e-commerce website.
The design should combine elements from both reference images to create a clean, minimalist aesthetic.

**From image 1, adopt the hero section's layout:**
- Place a prominent, dark text headline (e.g., 'Shop a dream') on the left half of the page, accompanied by a concise descriptive text and a black call-to-action button (e.g., 'View the collection') below it.
- Include a minimalist logo (e.g., 'CRAFT') in the top-left corner of this hero area.
- On the right half, feature a tall, partially visible lifestyle image, similar to the one in image 1, with subtle navigation arrows (e.g., for a carousel).

**From image 2, integrate the complete navigation structure:**
- At the very top, include a slender bar displaying social media icons and language options (e.g., 'PT EN FR') aligned to the far right.
- Directly below this, create a main navigation bar with a distinctive brand logo (e.g., 'quartosala HOME CULTURE') on the left and primary menu links (e.g., 'ABOUT', 'SHOPS', 'CATALOGUE', 'SERVICES') aligned to the right.
- Underneath the main navigation, incorporate a wide search bar (e.g., 'Find Products...') positioned on the left, next to a 'Visual Search' button, and additional utility icons (e.g., star, globe, hamburger menu) on the right.
objects: Slender top bar with social media icons and language options on the far right
Main navigation bar with brand logo (e.g., 'quartosala HOME CULTURE') on the left
Primary menu links (e.g., 'ABOUT', 'SHOPS', 'CATALOGUE', 'SERVICES') aligned to the right in the main navigation bar
Wide search bar (e.g., 'Find Products...') positioned on the left
'Visual Search' button next to the search bar
Additional utility icons (e.g., star, globe, hamburger menu) on the right
Minimalist logo (e.g., 'CRAFT') in the top-left corner of the hero area
Prominent dark text headline (e.g., 'Shop a dream') on the left half of the page
Black call-to-action button (e.g., 'View the collection') below the hero text
Tall, partially visible lifestyle image on the right half of the hero section
